full_text:
Li Sheng (Gongzhao) 李勝 (公昭)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Sheng (李勝), styledGongzhao (公昭). Member of Cao Shuang’s faction, he was sent to check on Sima Yi’s health. Li Sheng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
